2604.27624.title: Mapping how LLMs debate societal issues when shadowing human personality traits, sociodemographics and social media behavior
2604.27624.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) can strongly shape social discourse, yet datasets investigating how LLM outputs vary across controlled social and contextual prompting remain sparse. Cognitive Digital Shadows (CDS) is a 190,000-record synthetic corpus supporting analyses of LLM-generated discourse. Each CDS record is generated by one of 19 LLMs, prompted to shadow either a human persona or an AI-assistant role. CDS contains LLM responses on 4 controversial societal topics: vaccines/healthcare, social media disinformation, the gender gap in science, and STEM stereotypes. Persona-conditioned records encode 17 sociodemographic and psychological attributes, providing data linking LLMs' prompts, language, stances and reasoning. Texts are validated for topic anchoring and can support emotional analyses via interpretable NLP (e.g. textual forma mentis networks). CDS is enriched by a pooling platform with user-friendly dashboards, enabling easy, interactive group-level comparisons of emotional and semantic framing across personas, topics and models. The CDS prompting framework supports future audits of LLMs' bias, social sensitivity and alignment.
2604.27624.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）能夠強烈影響社會話語，然而研究LLM輸出在受控社會和情境提示下變化的數據集仍然稀缺。認知數位陰影（CDS）是一個包含190,000條記錄的合成語料庫，支持對LLM生成的話語進行分析。每條CDS記錄都是由19個LLM中的一個生成的，提示其模仿人類角色或AI助手角色。CDS包含關於4個有爭議的社會主題的LLM回應：疫苗/醫療保健、社交媒體虛假信息、科學中的性別差距和STEM刻板印象。基於角色的記錄編碼了17個社會人口學和心理屬性，提供了將LLM的提示、語言、立場和推理聯繫起來的數據。文本經過主題錨定驗證，並且可以通過可解釋的自然語言處理（例如，文本心智網絡）支持情感分析。CDS通過一個用戶友好的儀表板的聚合平台進行增強，使得在角色、主題和模型之間進行情感和語義框架的簡便互動式群體比較成為可能。CDS提示框架支持對LLM的偏見、社會敏感性和對齊的未來審核。
2604.27624.author: Ali Aghazadeh Ardebili et.al.
